{{Quote|If I destroy this place, General Mohc is going to be plenty testy. The thought warms me, and I'm going to need all the warm thoughts I can get on this frozen planet.|Kyle Katarn|<ref name="Dark Forces Official Player's Guide">''[[Dark Forces Official Player's Guide]]''</ref>}}
The '''Mission to Anteevy''' was a mission in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] in which a major [[Phase II Dark Trooper/Legends|Phase II dark trooper]] factory, [[Ice Station Beta/Legends|Imperial Robotics Construction Facility Ice Station Beta]] was destroyed.

Arriving from [[Cal-Seti/Legends|Cal-Seti]] tracing a [[smuggler ship (Cal-Seti)|smuggler ship]], [[Kyle Katarn]] explored the icy surroundings until he found a way to slip into the facility.

He used the conveyor belts to his advantage, and descented to the place of a spinning turbine with three coupling platforms. He planted one [[sequencer charge]]s to each of the [[exchange coupling]]s. Right then a new [[Phase II Dark Trooper/Legends|Phase II dark trooper]] intercepted him and engaged him in a duel. The two exchanged fire, and the dark trooper fell to Katarn's fire. Right then a door opened to a corridor maze, and Kyle moved to his exit, only to encounter several more [[Phase I Dark Trooper|Phase I dark troopers]]; he escaped the complex in the ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]''.<ref name="guide">''[[Dark Forces Official Player's Guide]]''</ref>

The complex exploded into a huge ball of fire, engulfing the factory and the rest of the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] in the area. Following the [[Mission to Gromas|destruction]] of the [[phrikite]] mines on [[Gromas 16]], the destruction brought a serious blow to the development of the [[Dark Trooper Project|Dark Trooper project]].<ref name="guide" />

==Behind the scenes==
In the game ''Dark Forces'', a secret area of the map for this mission consists of a hidden cave shaped like the head of the rabbit [[Max (bunny)|Max]]. While only the head's outline is shown on the map when the player discovers the cave, if he enters the LACDS cheat code, eyes, nose and mouth will become visible.

The above narration follows the ''[[Dark Forces Official Player's Guide]]'', which is based on the "Hard" difficulty level setting, where three Phase I dark troopers appear; in the "Medium" difficulty setting, only one appears.
